note: Events pulled from public Warrenville listings. Always links back to the official source. Refreshed weekly by the automation.

events.title: Summer Movies in the Park
events.blurb: Bring a blanket and the kids for a free outdoor movie under the stars. A laid-back summer-evening tradition in the park.

events.title: Lunchtime Live
events.blurb: Live music on your lunch break. A weekly summer series that brings a little energy to the middle of the day downtown.

events.title: 4th of July Celebration & Parade
events.time: Parade July 3, festivities July 3 evening through July 4
events.blurb: Two days of hometown celebration. The parade kicks things off on the 3rd, followed by an evening at Cerny Park and a full day of fun on the Fourth.

events.title: Firecracker 5K Run / Walk
events.blurb: Start the Fourth with a scenic 5K along the Illinois Prairie Path and Warrenville Grove Forest Preserve. Runners, walkers, and strollers all welcome.

events.title: Unplug Illinois Picnic in the Park
events.blurb: Put the screens down and come out for a community picnic. Games, food, and neighbors enjoying a summer afternoon together.

events.title: Summer Movies in the Park
events.blurb: The second outdoor movie night of the summer. Free, family-friendly, and a great excuse to spend an evening in the park.

events.title: Summer Daze
events.location: Warrenville City Hall Complex, 28W701 Stafford Place
events.source: City of Warrenville / Western DuPage Chamber
events.blurb: Warrenville's signature summer festival. Live music, food and drink, kids' rides and games, and local business booths. The weekend the whole town turns out.

events.title: Warrenville Car Show
events.blurb: Classic cars and showpieces roll into Summer Daze. A favorite for car lovers and anyone who likes a good Saturday stroll past some shine.

events.title: Art on the Prairie
events.blurb: A weekend celebration of local and regional artists, music, and makers. Warrenville's nod to its identity as a city with deep arts roots.

events.title: Holly Days
events.blurb: The town's holiday kickoff. Lights, seasonal cheer, and a warm community gathering to start December the right way.
